chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 117 – Nazool (Arrival) of Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/ 6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/ 6)
text: لَمَّا مَاتَ أَبِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) جَاءَتْ نَاقَةٌ لَهُ مِنَ الرَّعْيِ حَتَّى ضَرَبَتْ بِجِرَانِهَا عَلَى الْقَبْرِ وَ تَمَرَّغَتْ عَلَيْهِ فَأَمَرْتُ بِهَا فَرُدَّتْ إِلَى مَرْعَاهَا وَ إِنَّ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ يَحُجُّ عَلَيْهَا وَ يَعْتَمِرُ وَ لَمْ يَقْرَعْهَا قَرْعَةً قَطُّ.

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Hafs Bin Al Bakhtary, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> passed away, a she-camel of his<sup>asws</sup> came over from the pen until she struck herself upon the side of the grave and wallowed upon it. So I<sup>asws</sup> ordered with her, and she was returned to her pen, and that my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> had performed Hajj and Umrah upon her, and he<sup>asws</sup> had not whipped it with a whip at all’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn al-Faddal from ibn Bukayr from Zurara who has said the following. “I heard abu Ja‘far (a.s.) say, ‘Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) had a she camel. He had taken this camel twenty two times to Hajj (pilgrimage to Makka) and had not used the whip against not even once. The Imam (a.s.) has said that the camel came after he passed away and we were not aware but we noticed only when one of the servants or slaves came and said, “The she camel has went out all the way to the grave of Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) and sat on the grave. She rubs her neck against the grave and moans. I then asked them to quickly get to her before they would know about her or see her. The Imam (a.s.) has said, “She had never seen the grave before.”
